summary: Completed comprehensive testing of e-commerce platform with Grafana observability integration. Backend APIs fully functional with 100% success rate. Admin dashboard accessible with all 4 tabs working. Real metrics collection and InfluxDB integration confirmed. Minor session management issues persist.

minor_issues.issue: JWT token expiration causing quick session timeouts
minor_issues.impact: Users get logged out after short period during dashboard navigation
minor_issues.details: Same issue as previous iteration - JWT tokens expire quickly requiring frequent re-authentication

ui_bugs.details: Console warnings about chart width/height being -1, but charts still render correctly

integration_issues.details: User gets redirected to login page when navigating between dashboard tabs due to JWT expiration

minor_issues.details: JWT tokens expire quickly causing interruption in dashboard usage

passed_tests: All 35 backend API tests passed (100% success rate)
Dashboard Overview tab shows SRI, business stats, charts
Dashboard Infrastructure tab shows all 5 services
Real metrics endpoint (/api/metrics/real) returns actual data
InfluxDB receiving and storing metrics data
Grafana integration referenced in Infrastructure tab
E-commerce products page working (11 products displayed)
User registration form accessible and functional
Order creation and management working via API
Failure simulation buttons present in Infrastructure tab
action_item_for_main_agent: Consider increasing JWT token expiration time to improve user experience during dashboard navigation. Chart rendering warnings are minor but could be addressed for cleaner console output.
